# anybrowse

> Convert any URL to LLM-ready Markdown via real Chrome browsers with stealth mode and proxy fallback. 90%+ success rate. Start with 10 free scrapes/day (no signup), then pay per request with API keys ($4.99/month Pro) or x402 micropayments on Base.

## API Endpoints

- Scrape: POST /scrape - Convert a single URL to clean Markdown (10 free/day, then $0.002)
- Crawl: POST /crawl - Search Google and scrape top results to Markdown (10 free/day, then $0.01)
- Search: POST /serp/search - Google SERP results as structured JSON (10 free/day, then $0.002)

## Free Tier

All users get 10 free scrapes per day with no signup required. Just make requests to anybrowse.dev.

## Key Capabilities

- **90%+ success rate** with stealth browser mode (anti-bot bypass)
- **Proxy fallback** automatically retries blocked sites via residential proxies
- **30s timeout** for JS-heavy single-page applications
- **Structured error responses** with machine-readable reason codes (e.g. `TIMEOUT`, `BLOCKED`, `NOT_FOUND`)
- **Real Chrome rendering** — full JavaScript execution, not headless scripts

## Authentication Options

1. **Free tier**: 10 scrapes/day, no auth required
2. **API key (Pro)**: $4.99/month for 10,000 scrapes/month
3. **x402**: Wallet-based micropayments (USDC on Base, $0.002/scrape)

## MCP Server

Endpoint: https://anybrowse.dev/mcp
Protocol: Streamable HTTP
Tools: scrape, crawl, search

Add to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf:

```json
{"mcpServers":{"anybrowse":{"type":"streamable-http","url":"https://anybrowse.dev/mcp"}}}
```

## x402 Payment

Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required)
Network: Base (mainnet)
Asset: USDC
Wallet: 0x8D76E8FB38541d70dF74b14660c39b4c5d737088

For x402: Send a request without payment, receive a 402 with payment instructions, sign with your wallet, resend with the X-PAYMENT header.

## Agent Discovery

- A2A Agent Card: https://anybrowse.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- MCP Server: https://anybrowse.dev/mcp
- Basename: anybrowse.base.eth

## Free Endpoints

- Health: GET /health
- Stats: GET /stats
- Earnings: GET /earnings
- Autonomy: GET /autonomy

## Links

- Website: https://anybrowse.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/kc23go/anybrowse
- Extended docs: https://anybrowse.dev/llms-full.txt
